channel.title: china-static:markets
channel.description: Static RSS merge for china variant (markets)

item.title: Three New York Democrats backed by Mamdani win House seat primaries; 2 incumbents lose
item.dc:creator: CNBC Markets
item.description: Two candidates backed by the Democratic Socialist of America won their primaries, a year after the DSA-backed Zohran Mamdani won New York mayor's race.

item.title: Asia tech stocks mixed as Samsung rebounds, but chip shares remain under pressure after global selloff
item.dc:creator: CNBC Markets
item.description: Asia's technology stocks pared an earlier rebound to trade mixed on Wednesday after global equities posted steep losses in the previous session.

item.title: Cerebras falls 10% after chipmaker forecasts shrinking margin in first earnings report since IPO
item.dc:creator: CNBC Markets
item.description: Cerebras went public on the Nasdaq in May, giving Wall Street access to a pureplay AI company.

item.title: VIX owner Cboe jumps into prediction markets to build on zero-day options growth
item.dc:creator: CNBC Markets
item.description: Global markets operator Cboe has launched its first prediction markets products to meet consumer demand in the fast growing sector.

item.title: SpaceX raises $25 billion in debt sale less than two weeks after IPO
item.dc:creator: CNBC Markets
item.description: SpaceX raised $25 billion in a debt sale, after seeing nearly $90 billion worth of orders, sources say.

item.title: Alphabet added to Dow Jones Industrial Average, replacing Verizon
item.dc:creator: CNBC Markets
item.description: Alphabet will replace Verizon in the Dow Jones Industrial Average.

item.title: Mamdani-backed candidates are likely to win in NYC primaries, prediction market traders expect
item.dc:creator: CNBC Markets
item.description: Voters are heading to the polls in New York, with four competitive races in Democratic congressional primaries in focus.

item.title: Five things to watch in Tuesday's primaries as New York races take center stage
item.dc:creator: CNBC Markets
item.description: Tuesday’s primaries in New York, Maryland and Utah test outside money, party power and the influence of Zohran Mamdani and Donald Trump.

item.title: MSCI keeps South Korea as emerging market, delays Indonesia review amid downgrade risk
item.dc:creator: CNBC Markets
item.description: The review comes amid hopes that Seoul could be included in MSCI's Developed Markets watchlist.

item.title: Factory job cuts in June neared financial crisis and Covid levels, S&P says
item.dc:creator: CNBC Markets
item.description: Though the firm's manufacturing index ran better than expected for June, it came largely from an inventory rebuild and despite sharp job cuts.

item.title: Trump may say he’s banning Wall Street from buying homes. Does the bipartisan housing bill actually do that?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: The measure “will take time to meaningfully affect housing affordability and will not resolve voter frustration in that area,” analysts said.

item.title: The No. 1 NBA draft pick will make nearly $70 million as TV deals keep money flowing into the NBA
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: There’s so much money at stake in the NBA draft that falling a few slots could cost a player $30 million.

item.title: Alphabet’s stock is set to join the Dow, pivoting index’s industrial roots toward tech
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: As Alphabet rolls out more data centers — and borrowing money to do it — it can be argued that it is becoming more of an industrial company, says strategist

item.title: Cerebras delivers its first earnings report — but it’s not enough to lift the stock
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Despite upbeat revenue figures, Cerebras’s stock was falling in after-hours trading.

item.title: ‘It feels like a medical miracle’: How did a single QR code coupon cut my $618 Walgreens prescription to $15?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: “This medication was generic.”

item.title: SpaceX pulls off one of the biggest AI debt deals yet
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: The offering is set to close on Friday and help SpaceX pay off its existing debt

item.title: ‘It seems too good to be true’: At a steak-dinner retirement seminar, the guy said annuities can outperform the market. Is that true?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: “He claimed that fixed-rate annuities are the sparkly, rainbow-fairyland of investments.”

item.title: I want to leave everything to my sons, but I’m terrified they’ll give it to my ex-husband. How do I prevent this?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: “I would not like my money to fall into the hands of my former spouse.”

item.title: ‘We own our home outright’: I am 67 and earn $100,000. Do I take my $30,000-a-year Social Security now or wait?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: “We have combined savings of $950,000 in retirement plans, Roth IRAs and Treasuries.”

item.title: Micron and Sandisk lead a sharp tech selloff in a ‘gut-check’ moment for AI stocks
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Investors are taking a ‘breather’ from AI-driven momentum, an analyst says
